    Class
    Description
    AbstractExtractor
    Common implementation for extracting useful direct and derived hypotheses from a given set.
    Generator
    Represents a mechanism that produces new subgoals from a goal.
    GeneratorExtractor
    Extract useful inclusion predicates from a set of hypotheses.
    Goal
    Represents a membership predicate that the Membership Goal reasoner try to discharge.
    Inclusion
    Represents an inclusion predicate as used in the Membership Goal reasoner.
    MembershipExtractor
    Extract useful membership predicates from a set of hypotheses.
    MembershipGoal
    Discharge a sequent such as :
    MembershipGoalImpl
    Common implementation of the Membership goal reasoner and tactic.
    MembershipGoalRules
    Internal rules used by the Membership Goal reasoner for justification.
    Rationale
    A predicate that we can justify by a rule if needed.
